_meta.author: muhammad-binsalman
_meta.title: Ethereal Beams Hero
_meta.description:
*A mesmerizing hero section featuring animated 3D light beams with glassmorphic navigation. Perfect for modern SaaS, creative agencies, and tech startups looking to make a bold first impression.*

## **Key Features Listed:**

- Animated 3D light beams background
- Glassmorphic pill-shaped navigation
- Shimmer button effects
- Fully responsive design
- Black & white aesthetic


## **Custom Button Component**

- Built-in shimmer effect on hover
- Three variants: `default`, `outline`, `ghost`
- Two sizes: `sm`, `lg`
- Fully typed with TypeScript
- No external dependencies
